summary: The AI bubble cauldron continues to heat up as of 4 May 2026: the Shiller CAPE ratio climbed to 41.1×, just 2.4 points below the all-time dot-com peak of 43.5×. Hyperscaler capex guidance was revised upward to ~$740B for 2026 (Microsoft now tracking $150–190B, Meta raised to $125–145B). Nvidia deployed OpenAI's Codex agent across all 10,000 employees, heralding what Jensen Huang calls 'the age of AI'. Global data-centre power demand projections for 2026 were revised sharply upward to ~945 TWh, nearly matching prior 2030 estimates. VC AI concentration holds at 81% ($242B of $297B) and AI unicorn count holds at 308. FTC Operation AI Comply remains in active enforcement with ongoing compliance monitoring. Enterprise AI failure rates persist at 80–95% with only 48% of projects reaching production (Gartner).

capeRatio.label: CAPE Ratio
capeRatio.description: Cyclically adjusted P/E for US market — 41.1× in May 2026, just 2.4 pts below the dot-com all-time peak of 43.5×

sp500ForwardPE.label: S&P 500 Forward P/E
sp500ForwardPE.description: Forward price-to-earnings ratio for S&P 500 (5-yr median 21.1×, 10-yr median 19.8×)

top7StocksPE.label: Top 7 Stocks P/E
top7StocksPE.description: Average TTM P/E of the Magnificent 7 tech stocks (NVDA 38.6×, AMZN 33.4×, AAPL 32.8×, GOOGL 29.8×, META 27.0×, MSFT 24.0×; Tesla excluded as outlier at 326×)

vcAiConcentration.label: VC → AI Share
vcAiConcentration.description: Share of global Q1 2026 VC investment flowing into AI ($242B of $297B) — record high

hyperscalerCapexBn.label: Hyperscaler Capex 2026
hyperscalerCapexBn.description: Revised 2026 data center / AI capex across major hyperscalers (Amazon $200B, Google $185B, Microsoft ~$165B, Meta ~$135B, Oracle $55B) — guidance raised by Microsoft and Meta after Q1 2026 earnings

openAiRevenueBn.label: OpenAI Annual Revenue
openAiRevenueBn.description: Current annualised revenue run rate ($25B as of Feb 2026, doubled from $13B in 2025) vs $1.5T committed infrastructure spend through 2031

gridConnectionDelay.label: Grid Connection Delay
gridConnectionDelay.description: Average delay to connect a large-scale data center to the electricity grid (range 5–10 yrs); ~50% of 2026 US capacity at risk

dataCenterPowerDemandTWh.label: DC Power Demand
dataCenterPowerDemandTWh.description: Global data center electricity consumption (latest 2026 estimates revised sharply upward to ~945 TWh; 2030 now projected ~1,200 TWh; ~3% of global power use by 2026)

aiUnicornsSince2024.label: AI Unicorns (Global)
aiUnicornsSince2024.description: AI-focused companies with $1B+ valuation globally as of early 2026 — ~50% of all new unicorn formation

narrativeSurgeNewbird.label: NewBird AI 1-Day Surge
narrativeSurgeNewbird.description: Allbirds (footwear) rebranded as NewBird AI and surged 582% intraday on zero AI revenue

topStories.headline: CAPE ratio climbs to 41.1× in May 2026 — within 2.4 points of the dot-com all-time peak of 43.5×
Microsoft and Meta raise 2026 capex guidance; hyperscaler aggregate revised to ~$740B — up 80% YoY from 2025's $410B
Nvidia deploys OpenAI Codex to all 10,000 employees; Jensen Huang declares 'age of AI' while Altman calls it 'awesome'
Big Tech Q1 2026 earnings confirm $700B hyperscaler capex for 2026 — largest annual tech capex in history
topStories.source: Q1 2026 Earnings Reports (Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Meta)

topStories.headline: OpenAI hits $25B annualised revenue — doubled from $13B in 2025; eyes $1T IPO valuation by late 2026
FTC Operation AI Comply escalates to active investigations and consent orders in April 2026; EU AI Act transparency rules take effect Aug 2026
topStories.source: FTC Press Releases / AI Policy Desk

topStories.headline: Allbirds → NewBird AI: +582% in a single trading day
81% of all global VC ($242B of $297B) flowed into AI sector in Q1 2026 — record concentration
60%+ of S&P 500 earnings calls mentioned AI in Q1 2026 — record high, up from 47% in Q4 2025
Grid connection delays reach 5–10 years; 50% of 2026 US data centre capacity at risk of delay or cancellation
topStories.source: Energy Sector Research / Google / ERCOT Data

topStories.headline: OpenAI revenue $25B/yr vs $1.5T committed infrastructure spend through 2031
AI coding assistants made programming 19% slower due to refactoring AI-generated code
Chief AI Officer postings surged 478% then collapsed as boards absorb role into CIO/CTO
